details.test: Task 1: Add four cobalt drill bits for stainless steel under $25 each to the cart
Task 2: Purchase a product within a price range via category browse (adapted from machine vise task)
Task 3: Choose tool with longest warranty under $350 using comparison (adapted from torque wrench task)
Task 4: Build a 6-component kit with items under $40 each
Task 5: Buy the highest-rated product under $450 from a category
Task 6: Reorder from most recent order and pay via purchase order
Task 7: Request a quote for a customizable-style product
Task 8: Create a "CNC Setup - March" saved list with three tools under $150
Task 9: Record the product code in a saved note on the product page
